input.headline: The Nazis on trial: The enduring lessons of Nuremberg, 80 years on

raw.headline: The Nazis on trial: The enduring lessons of Nuremberg, 80 years on

winner: At Nuremberg, they said, 'Never forget.' Well, we didn’t—we just forgot which side was ours!

candidates.text: They say history never repeats itself, which is good—because if it did, I’d be really worried about the judges’ coffee choices at Nuremberg 2.0.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific with a modern twist on Nuremberg. It uses humor without being offensive, though the reference to 'coffee choices' feels slightly generic compared to the gravity of the topic."}

candidates.text: Why did the Nazi at Nuremberg bring a ladder? Because he wanted to *climb* down from history!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat forced and relies on a tired pun ('climb down from history'). It lacks specificity and fails to engage deeply with the historical context of Nuremberg, making it less surprising and less funny."}

candidates.text: At the Nuremberg trials, they had a special rule: no swastika armbands allowed in court. One defendant got caught sneaking one in—turns out he was just trying to mark his spot like everyone else at the buffet.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor feels forced and risks being insensitive given the serious subject matter."}

candidates.text: At Nuremberg, they said, 'Never forget.' Well, we didn’t—we just forgot which side was ours!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the context of Nuremberg, but it risks being offensive due to its casual handling of a sensitive historical topic. The humor feels forced and lacks the sharpness needed for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Hitler’s trial was so unfair—it even had a "no snacks" policy!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "The joke is offensive and trivializes a serious historical event."}
